name: getPayloadData
title: getPayloadData
syntax: getPayloadData(errorframe errFrame, byte[] payload, dword payloadSize;
description: Returns the valid payload of a frame that was interrupted during transmission.
Depending on error position valid bits are written to the payload parameter. If there is no payload data, nothing is written into the payload parameter.

parameters.name: errFrame
parameters.description: Error frame which includes the payload.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: Array for writing the transmitted payload of the error frame.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
